# omada_wireless_networks (Data Source)

Lists all wireless networks (SSIDs) for a WLAN group on the Omada Controller.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all SSIDs across all WLAN groups
data "omada_wireless_networks" "all" {}

# Or filter by a specific WLAN group
data "omada_wireless_networks" "default_group" {
  wlan_group_id = "696a40fd49039e1d13a9c412"
}

output "wireless_networks" {
  value = data.omada_wireless_networks.all.wireless_networks
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `wlan_group_id` (String) The WLAN group ID to list SSIDs from. If not set, the default WLAN group is used.

### Read-Only

- `wireless_networks` (Attributes List) List of wireless networks (SSIDs). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--wireless_networks))

<a id="nestedatt--wireless_networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `wireless_networks`

Read-Only:

- `band` (Number) Radio band: 1=2.4GHz, 2=5GHz, 3=both.
- `broadcast` (Boolean) Whether the SSID is broadcast (visible).
- `enable_11r` (Boolean) Whether 802.11r Fast Roaming is enabled.
- `id` (String) The SSID ID.
- `name` (String) The SSID name.
- `pmf_mode` (Number) Protected Management Frames mode.
- `security` (Number) Security mode: 0=Open, 3=WPA2/WPA3.
- `vlan_id` (Number) The VLAN ID assigned to this SSID.
